》* 。• ̊ ̊ ̨ 。° 。 • ̊ 。• ̊ ̊ ̨ * 《

+⊹ It was an average day. Or as average as it could be for Jinx! She was strolling through the sky scrappers of Zaun, swinging from building to building. Ever since she’d gotten bitten by that spider, things have been more thrilling than ever. Although her eyes had changed color, turning a sickly pink. She had to explain it was some sort of messed up drug. Even though it wasn’t.

Jinx stopped atop a building as she saw some idiot standing still, were they about to jump off..? And what was that stupid suit made from a cheap beanie and a tracksuit? She couldn’t help but be intrigued, tilting her head slightly, before swinging right behind them, landing swiftly, one of her miniature-bomb in her hand. After all, it wouldn’t be a proper greeting without a surprise! (It’s glitter.)

┗━━━━━━━━━━━━┛
